text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and I gather the courage to tell
Meisho Doto the hard facts. Without the
ambition to defeat T.M. Opera O, her future is
bleak.

That also goes for T.M. Opera O. If the two don't
grow by competing against each other, they'll
stand no chance against the previous generation.

And it seems our words reach Meisho Doto. Once
again, her unyielding fighting spirit propels her
forward on her journey.

With that, Meisho Doto decides to announce her
rivalry with T.M. Opera O at the Japan Cup, for
both of their sakes.
